zh.Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 沃爾辛厄姆
zh.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham於大約1265年出生在英國英格蘭。她於1282年與Richard de Walsingham I在英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 沃爾辛厄姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可蕾托 沃爾辛厄姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham于大约1265年出生在英国英格兰。她于1282年与Richard de Walsingham I在英国英格兰諾福爾可蕾托 沃爾辛厄姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Walsingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great or Little Walsingham in Norfolk. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wæls + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + hām ‘village, homestead’.

en.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham was born about 1265, in England, United Kingdom. She married Richard de Walsingham I in 1282, in Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

et.Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England: Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Inglismaa, United Kingdom

fi.Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England: Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Englanti, Yhdistynyt kuningaskunta

fr.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham est née environ 1265, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard de Walsingham I en 1282, à Little Walsingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England: Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham wurde um 1265 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1282 in Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Richard de Walsingham I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

ja.Little Walsingham, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル ワルシンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsinghamは約1265年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。1282年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル ワルシンガムでRichard de Walsingham Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham(은)는 대략 1265년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리틀 월징함에서 Richard de Walsingham I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Christina of Walsingham родилась около 1265 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Walsingham I в 1282 г. в местности литл валсингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
